# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "AWSTemplateFormatVersion": "2010-09-09",
  "Description": "A template for an S3 bucket that stores user uploaded files.",
  "Resources": {
    "S3Bucket": {
      "Type": "AWS::S3::Bucket",
      "Properties": {
        "AccessControl": "PublicRead" 
      } 
    },
    "IAMRole": {
      "Type": "AWS::IAM::Role",
      "Properties": { 
        "AssumeRolePolicyDocument": {
          "Version": "2012-10-17", 
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "", 
              "Effect": "Allow", 
              "Principal": {
                "Service": ["s3.amazonaws.com"]
              }, 
              "Action": ["sts:AssumeRole"] 
            }
          ]
        }, 
        "Path": "/",  
        "Policies": [
          {
            "PolicyName": "S3ReadWriteAccess",  
            "PolicyDocument": {
              "Version": "2012-10-17",  
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Sid": "", 
                  "Effect": "Allow", 
                  "Action": ["s3:*"], 
                  "Resource": "*" 
                }
              ]
            }
          }, 
          {
            "PolicyName": "S3ListAccess", 
            "PolicyDocument": { 
              "Version": "2012-10-17",  
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Sid": "", 
                  "Effect": "Allow", 
                  "Action": ["s3:ListBucket"], 
                  "Resource": "*" 
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ], 
        "ManagedPolicyArns": [ 
          "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess" 
        ]
      }
    }, 
    "IAMRolePolicyAttachment": { 
      "Type": "AWS::IAM::Role", 
      "Properties": { 
        "RoleName": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.IAMRole}",  
        "Policies": [ 
          { 
            "PolicyArn": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.IAMRolePolicyAttachment}" 
          }
        ]
      }
    }, 
    "S3BucketPolicy": { 
      "Type": "AWS::S3::Bucket", 
      "Properties": { 
        "AccessControl": "PublicRead",  
        "BucketName": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.S3Bucket}"  
      }  
    }
  }, 
  "Outputs": {
    "S3Bucket": {
      "Description": "",
      "Value": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.S3Bucket}" 
    },
    "IAMRole": {
      "Description": "", 
      "Value": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.IAMRole}" 
    },  
    "IAMRolePolicyAttachment": {  
      "Description": "", 
      "Value": "${S3Bucket.Outputs.IAMRolePolicyAttachment}" 
    }
  }
}
